flashcards.definition: Getting more useful output from less energy input (e.g., LED vs. incandescent bulbs).
Reducing energy use through behavioral changes (e.g., turning off lights, lowering thermostat).
Combined Heat and Power — using waste heat from electricity production for heating; ~80% total efficiency.
US EPA/DOE program certifying energy-efficient appliances and buildings.
A unit of energy saved through efficiency; often cheaper than generating new energy.
